question:
What are the characteristic features of In-Plane Switching (IPS)? (Select 3 answers)

High color quality
Fast response times
Wide viewing angles
Low color quality
Slow response times
Low viewing angles
canonical_answer:
High color quality

Wide viewing angles

Slow response times

appears_in.title: Comptia A Practice Test 1101
appears_in.answer:
High color quality
